match.userMessage:
Natural cinematic realism starting frame of SCARLETT in casual light-colored top with high-waisted linen shorts and bright coral lipstick, captured mid-motion as she rises from crouch and turns to wade forward into the shallows with one foot already stepping into the water and foam beginning to swirl around her calves, the lipstick tube from (CORAL_LIPSTICK) planted upright and clearly visible in the wet sand directly behind her, sunny beach shoreline at morning with glistening wet sand, small rolling waves, white foam and scattered broken coral shells, bright natural daylight with sparkling water reflections and clean directional shadows across the sand, shallow depth of field keeping SCARLETT and the immediate shallows sharp while softly blurring the distant ocean horizon, eye-level camera angle with subtle handheld energy, airy high-key color grading and tactile environmental detail

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BEACH SHORELINE - MORNING - Sandy beach shoreline where waves meet wet sand
    - Image 3 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - Slim elegant lipstick tube with smooth cylindrical metallic casing in soft coral-pink finish
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
